description_long: This is a compact bar setup featuring a wooden counter with a black front panel, two wooden chairs, and a tall wooden back wall with shelving. The back wall displays a sign reading 'THE Waiting BAR' in white script and is flanked by metal supports. Shelves on either side of the back wall are stocked with bottles, suggesting a well-equipped bar. The countertop holds a vintage gramophone and a set of headphones, adding a retro touch. The overall design is open, with no visible doors or windows, and the materials and finishes evoke a warm, inviting atmosphere.
description: A small, open bar with a wooden counter, shelving stocked with bottles, two wooden chairs, and a prominent back wall sign reading 'THE Waiting BAR'. The setup features a retro gramophone and headphones on the counter.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the bar counter, two wooden chairs, gramophone, headphones, and the back wall with signage and bottle shelves.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wooden surfaces and overall layout, with the shelving and signage less visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the bar, shelving, and the arrangement of the counter and chairs from behind.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the bar counter, chairs, gramophone, headphones, and the 'THE Waiting BAR' sign with bottle shelves on both sides.
attribute_signage: Wall-mounted, white script text reading 'THE Waiting BAR' centered on the wooden back wall, unlit and prominent.
